calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2010 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-30-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Brett Pedersen, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Samuel Merritt University, Successor-in-Interest to California College of Podiatric Medicine.
Karrie Henry, Student Loan Coordinator for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Paul W. Wade.
Default was entered against defendant on Oceober 13, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Samuel Merritt College, Successor-in-Interest to California College of Podiatric Medicine, and against the Defaulted Defendant Paul W. Wade as follows:

Damages/Principal - $7,750.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $8,367.90.
Attorney Fees - $2,869.00.
Late Fees - $89.00.
Costs - $815.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $19,890.90.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
